title: Dynamite
writer: Jeanie Macpherson, John Howard Lawson, Gladys Unger
actors: Conrad Nagel, Kay Johnson, Charles Bickford
plot: Wealthy Cynthia is in love with not-so-wealthy Roger, who is married to Marcia. The threesome is terribly modern about the situation, and Marcia will gladly divorce Roger if Cynthia agrees to a financial settlement. But Cynthia's ...
